message:
test(wasm-abi): comprehensive Next.js App Router integration test suite

Adds 191 lines of tests for the Next.js integration types covering:

- Render environment predicates: validates supports_wasm_runtime(),
  has_browser_apis(), and is_server_side() return correct values for
  all 5 environment variants (ClientHydrated, ClientSsr,
  ServerComponent, EdgeRuntime, NodeServer)
- Capability matrix: exercises is_capability_available() across the
  full environment x capability cross product, verifying WASM runtime
  is ClientHydrated-only, server capabilities (cookies, request
  context, Node APIs) are server-only, client capabilities (DOM,
  WebWorkers, browser storage) are ClientHydrated-only, and shared
  capabilities (ReactHooks, AuthenticatedFetch) work in both client
  environments
- Bootstrap phase state machine: validates transition legality for
  Idle->Loading->Hydrating->Active->Idle and rejects invalid
  transitions (Idle->Active, Loading->Idle, etc.)
- Anti-pattern detection and component placement classification
- Integration snapshot construction and diagnostic state aggregation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
